_note: NOT telemetry from .checkpoints/usage.sqlite — that store is opt-in, content-free and cannot be backfilled. This is a one-shot retroactive export of Claude Code transcript usage, shaped to satisfy the oc-telemetry-ops export contract. Interactive sessions are not skill runs, so skill-semantic fields are null rather than faked.
source: claude-code transcripts (~/.claude/projects), deduped by message.id, merged append-safe
avg_cost_per_feature_definition: feature := merged PR; mean cost over the 11 merged PRs carrying attributed spend
_null_fields_note: pipelines_run / by_skill / eval_score_trend are N/A: interactive Claude Code sessions carry no skill-run or eval semantics.
